epigraph: “The early morning has gold in its mouth.” — Franklin

messages.preview: Even more insane, I’m monitoring and interacting with Claude code via my phone to my laptop while doing a shop in Sainsburys 😂
Thanks. And yes to watching a game or two with the boys. Would be fun
Sorry to be a pain but I just remembered I left my green stone ring out by the bathroom sink would you mind putting it in the drawer beneath

tasks.text: Brian. Book meeting Prep for Caroline
Get testimonial quote from CEO of Parkinson's UK (on-on-one in two weeks).

weather.narrative: Drizzle through the morning, easing by afternoon. Take a coat for the school run.

lead.headline: Teresa's resignation requires immediate attention and transition planning.
lead.deck: With multiple Day2Health meetings scheduled today and strategic initiatives in motion, losing a team member creates an urgent gap that needs to be addressed before momentum stalls. This needs to be prioritized before other commitments consume your bandwidth.
